# sepaQRcode vendor files

This folder contains browser-global SEPA QR code assets from:

https://github.com/sepaqr/sepaQRcode

The Aurelia component at `src/components/sepa-qr` loads `/vendor/sepaqr/sepaqr.min.js`.

Credit: sepaQR was created by Max Schulze for https://sepaqr.eu.

The upstream project is distributed under the MIT license. The bundled QR code
generator is based on QRCode for JavaScript by Kazuhiko Arase, also under the
MIT license.
